evidence_from_current_ledgers: AI factory, accelerator, semiconductor, power, and token-economics packages already form a layered systems language.
gap: No core clarity gap; risk is overuse.
decision_rule: Keep strongest system diagrams, then prune duplicates when a chapter starts to feel like a dashboard.

evidence_from_current_ledgers: Page-flow and render-smoke ledgers show photo/capture/rights debt and early single-visual chapters.
gap: Not enough publication-ready scene, object, lab, or physical infrastructure texture.
decision_rule: Add only rights-clean source/scene exhibits that carry story purpose; otherwise strengthen prose instead.

evidence_from_current_ledgers: Infrastructure and geopolitics are present in prose and source maps, but selected figures skew diagrams/cards.
gap: Place is under-expressed relative to infrastructure stakes.
decision_rule: Use maps only for bottleneck explanation, not ambient geography.

evidence_from_current_ledgers: Selected ledger includes many screenshot slots and product surfaces.
gap: Capture, rights, and caption gates remain open for key screenshots.
decision_rule: No screenshot survives final selection without capture hash, access date, rights/private-use note, and blocked-claim caption.

evidence_from_current_ledgers: Source cards, GTC provenance, model cards, and evidence lanes are a distinctive strength.
gap: Selected-100 ledger underrepresents some strong source-card candidates.
decision_rule: Replace weak screenshots/photos with source cards when they improve trust and reduce rights risk.

evidence_from_current_ledgers: I-0231 finds Chapters 2-5 too open, Chapters 15-16 crowded, and late chapters mechanism-heavy.
gap: The full-book visual rhythm is not yet shelf-caliber.
decision_rule: Balance by chapter role: early chapters need texture, industrial chapters need pruning, synthesis chapters need breathing room.

evidence_from_current_ledgers: Render smoke flags long captions, small caveat text, and source-note proximity risks.
gap: The safety language is strong but can look like ledger apparatus.
decision_rule: Compress wording only after exact claim mapping is preserved.

evidence_from_current_ledgers: Photos, screenshots, and raw slide surfaces remain open production debt.
gap: Rights debt blocks market-quality visual confidence.
decision_rule: Treat any unresolved rights/capture slot as replaceable until final triage closes it.

evidence_from_current_ledgers: Claim-blocker maps, AI-factory systems, token economics, and source-caveat cards create a distinctive visual language.
gap: Originality can become visually heavy if every page explains caveats the same way.
decision_rule: Rotate visual families so the book feels authored, not templated.

evidence_from_current_ledgers: Render smoke exists, but no assembled full-book render has proved trim, captions, and page turns.
gap: Visual ambition is not yet proven on actual pages.
decision_rule: Do not call any figure publication-ready until the assembled render confirms legibility and placement.
